cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Definition of the derivative (limit form)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Alternate definition of the derivative at $x = a$ (limit as $x \to a$)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Average rate of change of $f$ on $[a, b]$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Difference quotient of $f$ at $x$ with increment $h$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Power Rule: derivative of $x^n$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Constant Rule: derivative of a constant $c$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Constant Multiple Rule: derivative of $c \cdot f(x)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Sum/Difference Rule: derivative of $f(x) \pm g(x)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Product Rule: derivative of $f(x) \cdot g(x)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Quotient Rule: derivative of $\dfrac{f(x)}{g(x)}$

cards.prompt: Derivative of $\sin x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\cos x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\tan x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\sec x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\csc x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\cot x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $e^x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\ln x$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $a^x$ for constant $a > 0$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\log_a x$ for constant $a > 0,\, a \neq 1$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Equation of the tangent line to $f$ at $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Equation of the normal line to $f$ at $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A function $f$ is said to have this property at $x = c$ if $\lim_{x \to c} f(x) = f(c)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The property of a function when $\lim_{h \to 0} \frac{f(c+h) - f(c)}{h}$ exists; this implies continuity but not vice versa

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A point on the graph of $f$ where $f$ is continuous but not differentiable due to an abrupt change in slope — the left-hand and right-hand derivatives exist but are unequal

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A point where $f$ is continuous and the slope of the tangent approaches $\pm\infty$ — the function is not differentiable here

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The limit $\lim_{h \to 0} \frac{f(a+h) - f(a)}{h}$ — the ratio of change in $f$ to a small increment $h$ before taking the limit

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The line through $(a, f(a))$ with slope $f'(a)$ — it touches the graph of $f$ at exactly that point and matches the curve's direction there

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The line through $(a, f(a))$ perpendicular to the tangent line — its slope is the negative reciprocal of $f'(a)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A rule stating that if $f$ is differentiable at $c$, then $f$ must be continuous at $c$ — but the converse is false

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Two special trigonometric limits used in the derivative definition of $\sin x$: $\lim_{\theta \to 0} \frac{\sin \theta}{\theta}$ and $\lim_{\theta \to 0} \frac{1 - \cos \theta}{\theta}$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $\sqrt{x}$ using Power Rule (write in radical form, then power form, then result)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Derivative of $x^{-n}$ (negative power)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The notation $\frac{dy}{dx}$, $y'$, $f'(x)$, and $D_x f$ all refer to this operation on a function

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Product Rule extended to three functions: derivative of $f(x) \cdot g(x) \cdot h(x)$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A point on the graph where $f$ is continuous but the tangent line has a 'V-shape' — the function has equal left and right limits but unequal one-sided derivatives

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Definition of the right-hand derivative of $f$ at $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Definition of the left-hand derivative of $f$ at $x = a$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A condition that guarantees differentiability at $x = a$: both the left-hand and right-hand derivatives exist and are equal at that point

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The linearization (local linear approximation) of $f$ at $x = a$
